revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:稲荷山古墳]]
List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari" (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the Japanese Archipelago whose names include "Inari" (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout Japan, there are many kofun with names such as "Inari-zuka" (稲荷塚) and "Inari-yama" (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as "Inari-mori" (稲荷森), "Inari-mae" (稲荷前), and "Inari-dai" (稲荷台), creating diverse naming patterns.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} ==
* {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture, part of the Shiraishi Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=}} - Located in Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture, part of the Saitama Kofun Cluster. ** {{ill|Inariyama Sword|en|Inariyama Sword|qid=Q856395|lt=Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword|1=Inariyama Sword}} (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture, part of the Dairizuka Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=}} - Located in Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture, part of the Mikuriya Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} ==
* {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}}*** A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}}*** Located in Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}}*** Located in Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}}*** Located in Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture, part of the Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=}}*** Located in Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}}*** Located in Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=}}*** Located in Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture, part of the Furuichi Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}}*** Located in Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mori Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture, part of the Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture, part of the Semba Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|en|1=Inaridai Kofun Group|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai Kofun Group|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai Kofun Group|qq=}} - Located in Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=}} (稲荷台1号墳)
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture, part of the Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture, part of the Muko Hill Kofun Cluster.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|稲荷山古墳|version=101704900|comment=Imported full ja history}}
